name: Tanmay Bharat Mude
title: Mechanical Design Engineer
tagline: Turning engineering problems into manufacturable, tested, documented solutions.
summary: Detail-oriented Mechanical Engineer with hands-on experience in CAD modeling, GD&T, robotics integration, fabrication supervision, and automation programming. Skilled in translating design intent into manufacturable parts using Fusion 360, CATIA, and SolidWorks, with practical shop-floor exposure to CNC machining, sheet metal fabrication, and welding/fettling quality control. Seeking to apply strong problem-solving skills and CAD proficiency to real-world product development and manufacturing engineering roles.
